title: Token Weight Chorus
prompt:
Create a production-ready Token Weight Chorus using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original text effect lets a reader choose which of three short editorial words receives emphasis in a sentence. The selected word becomes heavier and gains a compact violet underline while the surrounding sentence remains calm and selectable. Use a white Bento panel on #F4F5F6 with 22px corners, #ECECEE border, soft shadow, #111111 typography, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Violet is the sole bright accent; use no gradients and no auto-playing character scramble.

Implement three real buttons in an accessible labelled group. Click, Enter, and Space choose a word, update aria-pressed, and announce the emphasis with a polite live region. Animate font-weight-adjacent scale and underline transform with a spring near stiffness 300 damping 24; use a 140ms ease-out fade for the accompanying annotation. Do not create timers, random values, network requests, storage, remote images, or dynamically generated text. Preserve meaningful static copy during server rendering.

The line must wrap gracefully at 320px, remain readable on a large detail preview, and never require hover. Use visible keyboard focus, AA contrast, semantic text, and logical order. The meaning must be understandable with color removed because the active word carries an explicit annotation. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by removing the scale motion and simply showing the active underline. Return full copyable client code plus runnable CSS and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:

communication.

*/ .token-weight-chorus{padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111;font:500 1.5rem/1.15 system-ui}.token-weight-chorus button{border:0;background:transparent;color:inherit;font:inherit}.token-weight-chorus button[aria-pressed=true]{font-weight:900;text-decoration:underline 4px #a78bfa;text-underline-offset:8px}.token-weight-chorus button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:4px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.token-weight-chorus *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [a,setA]=React.useState(0),w=['Clear','calm','useful'];return
WEIGHT CHORUS

{w.map((x,i)=>setA(i)} animate={{scale:a===i?1.06:1}} style={{marginRight:8,border:0,background:'transparent',fontSize:'inherit',fontWeight:a===i?900:500,textDecoration:a===i?'underline 4px #a78bfa':'none',textUnderlineOffset:8}}>{x})}communication.

Emphasis: {w[a]}.

}return ;})()
